text:
Once upon a time in Whovania, there lived a young girl named Luna Lovegood. Luna wasn't just any girl; her feathers were violet-blue, just like her famed grandfather Owlsworth. She lived in Owlswicksbury, a quaint little village that looked exactly like Hogwarts except for the fact that owls were everyone's favorite creature.

One ordinary night, Luna sat quietly beside her favorite owl, Luna Lovegood Owlsworth Two-Eyes. Just as stars began to pop twinkling nocturnally, an owl silence-breaker fluttered past her window.

"Lories!"

She peered out.

A great owl with wide spectacles flew past.

"What's up?"

Just a parrotvore.

"Loves stories!

A story about me?"

With a grand feathered flap, the owl perched beside her.

"Luna Lovegood!"

She stared into her peculiar owl-OASIS buddy.

A story about flying over Hogwarts—

And discovering an invisible tree.

You see, there was this
